conductors.name: Nelson Kwei
conductors.title: Artistic Director & Principal Conductor
conductors.bio: A distinguished choral conductor, dedicated to the promotion and practice of choral art, renowned for his exquisite musical interpretation and profound artistic attainments.
conductors.education: Graduate of the Advanced Choral Conducting program at the Royal Academy of Music, London; Fellow of the London College of Music (FLCM).
conductors.experience: Founder and Artistic Director of the Singapore Choral Festival; frequently invited as an adjudicator for international choral competitions.
achievements: Graduated from the Advanced Choral Conducting program at the Royal Academy of Music; awarded Fellowship of the London College of Music.
Led choirs to achieve prestigious awards on the international stage, accumulating over 100 gold medals and Grand Prix titles.
Multiple recipient of the 'Best Conductor' award at international choral festivals in Germany, Italy, Austria, and the Czech Republic.
Founder and Artistic Director of 'Song Journey' and 'Asia Singing' International Choral Festivals.
Served as Choral Advisor and Music Appraisal Officer for the National Arts Council of Singapore.
Dedicated to nurturing local talent; approximately 40% of active Singaporean choral conductors have been trained under his guidance.
conductors.philosophy: Music is the bridge of the soul; choral singing is the harmony that connects us. I hope that through every performance, every listener can feel the power and beauty of music.

conductors.name: Foong Hak Luen
conductors.title: Artistic Director & Conductor
conductors.bio: An outstanding new-generation choral conductor, adept at interpreting diverse musical styles and shaping choral acoustics, active on both local and international stages.
conductors.education: Master of Arts in Choral Conducting (Honors), University of Saint Joseph; Conducting Fellowship Diploma, London College of Music.
conductors.experience: Current conductor for several top school choirs, leading them to consistent international gold awards.
achievements: Master of Arts in Choral Conducting (Honors), University of Saint Joseph; Fellowship Diploma in Conducting, London College of Music.
The only conductor in Singapore to lead choirs from Primary, Secondary, and Junior College levels to achieve Honours Gold/Distinction at the Singapore Youth Festival (SYF).
Since 2013, choirs under his baton have consistently achieved Distinction awards at the SYF Arts Presentation.
Led choirs to win Gold medals and Grand Prix titles in Italy, the Czech Republic, Russia, and China.
Three-time recipient of the 'Best Conductor' award at international competitions.
Frequently invited as an international adjudicator and clinician for conducting masterclasses.
Served as Artistic Director for the inaugural Singapore Choral Festival (SG50), conducting a mass choir of over 1,000 singers.
Conducted the Singapore Chinese Orchestra's 'Harmony Voices' concert and the choral segment of Kit Chan's 'My Musical Journey' concert.
conductors.philosophy: Conveying beauty through music; connecting hearts through harmony.

intro:
Konzert Singers is a vibrant choral ensemble, bringing together a community of music lovers who strive for excellence.

We believe that sound is not merely a pleasure for the ears, but a resonance of the soul. Here, members of different ages and backgrounds gather for their shared passion for music. Whether it is the energetic youth or the wise and steady seniors, we all interpret every moving movement with the most sincere emotions.

We embrace cultural diversity, passionately performing the profound depths of Chinese culture while warmly welcoming the richness of world music. We believe that music is a universal language and the most touching bridge between cultures.

Sing, and let the song live on! At Konzert Singers, we record life through song and convey truth, goodness, and beauty through harmony. Join us to experience the charm of choral singing and let music light up your life!

videos.title: Embracing the Sunset
videos.description: Konzert Singers perform a classic Chinese piece with deep emotion and warmth.

videos.title: Youth Unfading
videos.description: A melody brimming with youthful vitality, singing out infinite aspirations for the future.

videos.title: Sing of Mountain and Sea
videos.description: A majestic ode to nature, showcasing the grand narrative of choral art.

videos.title: Keindahan Taman
videos.description: A beautiful Malay choral work, displaying the musical charm of diverse cultures.

videos.title: The Stream Flows
videos.description: An adaptation of a classic Xinyao song, telling the story of time like a gentle flowing stream.

videos.title: Hope
videos.description: A theme full of positive energy, conveying hope and strength through song.

performances.name: SG60 Choral Festival
performances.intro: Celebrating Singapore's 60th anniversary, Konzert Singers will perform alongside other outstanding choirs to bless the nation with song.

performances.name: SOTA Musicians Association 15th Anniversary Concert
performances.intro: Honoring the heritage of art and composing a beautiful chapter together. Konzert Singers is invited to perform at the SOTA Musicians Association's 15th Anniversary Celebration.

footer.about: Sharing beauty through music, connecting hearts in harmony. We are committed to creating high-quality musical experiences and bringing artistic enjoyment and cultural enrichment to the community.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Konzert Singers. All rights reserved. | Let music light up life

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you are passionate about choral art and looking for like-minded partners, or if you wish to collaborate with us for performances and artistic exchange, please feel free to contact us.
